modules.name: gemlite.triton_kernels.gemm_A16fWnO16f_int32packing
documentation: Written by Dr. Hicham Badri @Mobius Labs GmbH - 2024

functions.name: gemlite.triton_kernels.gemm_A16fWnO16f_int32packing.kernel_config_pruner
documentation: code based https://github.com/fpgaminer/GPTQ-triton

functions.name: gemlite.triton_kernels.gemm_A16fWnO16f_int32packing.get_default_config
documentation: 4090 RTX

functions.name: gemlite.triton_kernels.gemm_A16fWnO16f_int32packing.gemm_A16fWnO16f_int32packing_kernel
documentation:
Based on https://github.com/fpgaminer/GPTQ-triton
GEMM for C = matmul(A, dequantize(B, scales, zeros))
A is of shape (M, K): float16 or bfloat16
B is of shape (K//elements_per_sample, N): int32 as a packed matrix
C is of shape (M, N): float16 or bfloat16 depending on the input A
scales and zeros is of shape (group_size, N): float16 or bfloat16

BLOCK_SIZE_M >=16
BLOCK_SIZE_K <= group_size
@triton.heuristics(values={'CLOSEST_M': lambda args: 2 ** int(math.ceil(math.log2(args['M'])))})

modules.name: gemlite.triton_kernels.gemv_splitK_A16fWnO16f_int32packing
documentation: Written by Dr. Hicham Badri @Mobius Labs GmbH - 2024

functions.name: gemlite.triton_kernels.gemv_splitK_A16fWnO16f_int32packing.get_default_config
documentation: Optimized for low-batch size decoding: K needs to be divisible by BLOCK_SIZE_K * SPLIT_K = 256 !!!

functions.name: gemlite.triton_kernels.gemv_splitK_A16fWnO16f_int32packing.gemv_splitK_A16fWnO16f_int32packing_kernel
documentation:
Based on https://github.com/foundation-model-stack/foundation-model-stack/blob/triton/triton/kernels/gptq/splitk_dequant_gemm.py
GEMM for C = matmul(A, dequantize(B, scales, zeros))
A is of shape (M, K): float16 or bfloat16
B is of shape (K//elements_per_sample, N): int32 as a packed matrix
C is of shape (M, N): float16 or bfloat16 depending on the input A
scales and zeros is of shape (group_size, N): float16 or bfloat16

BLOCK_SIZE_M >=16
BLOCK_SIZE_K * SPLIT_K <= group_size for imp1
BLOCK_SIZE_K == SPLIT_K for imp2 (similar to original)

functions.name: gemlite.triton_kernels.gemv_revsplitK_A16fWnO16f_int32packing.gemv_revsplitK_A16fWnO16f_int32packing_kernel
documentation:
GEMV for C = matmul(A, dequantize(B, scales, zeros)). This is optimized for M==1
A is of shape (M, K): float16 or bfloat16
B is of shape (K // elements_per_sample, N): int32 as a packed matrix
C is of shape (M, N): float16 or bfloat16 depending on the input A
scales and zeros is of shape (group_size, N): float16 or bfloat16

functions.name: gemlite.triton_kernels.gemm_splitK_A16fWnO16f_int32packing.get_default_config
documentation: Optimized for low-batch size decoding: K needs to be divisible by BLOCK_SIZE_K * SPLIT_K = 256 !!!

functions.name: gemlite.triton_kernels.gemm_splitK_A16fWnO16f_int32packing.gemm_splitK_A16fWnO16f_int32packing_kernel
documentation:
Based on https://github.com/foundation-model-stack/foundation-model-stack/blob/triton/triton/kernels/gptq/splitk_dequant_gemm.py
GEMM for C = matmul(A, dequantize(B, scales, zeros))
A is of shape (M, K): float16 or bfloat16
B is of shape (K//elements_per_sample, N): int32 as a packed matrix
C is of shape (M, N): float16 or bfloat16 depending on the input A
scales and zeros is of shape (group_size, N): float16 or bfloat16

BLOCK_SIZE_M >=16
BLOCK_SIZE_K * SPLIT_K <= group_size for imp1
BLOCK_SIZE_K == SPLIT_K for imp2 (similar to original)
